allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive library redesign documentation

This commit adds complete planning documentation for converting
OutlabsAuth from a centralized API service to a FastAPI library.

Core Documents:
- REDESIGN_VISION.md: Project vision, goals, and success criteria
- LIBRARY_ARCHITECTURE.md: Technical architecture and design
- IMPLEMENTATION_ROADMAP.md: 7-week phase-by-phase plan
- API_DESIGN.md: Developer experience and code examples
- MIGRATION_GUIDE.md: Converting from centralized API
- DESIGN_DECISIONS.md: Architectural decisions and trade-offs
- COMPARISON_MATRIX.md: Feature comparison across presets

Key Design Decisions:
- Three presets: SimpleRBAC, HierarchicalRBAC, FullFeatured
- Gradual complexity model (start simple, upgrade as needed)
- Preserve entity hierarchy and tree permissions
- MongoDB first, optional multi-tenant support
- FastAPI-native integration with dependency injection

Examples Structure:
- Created examples/ directory for future demo apps
- Will include simple_app, hierarchical_app, full_featured_app
- Migration example showing before/after

Timeline: 7-8 weeks from planning to production-ready library

This redesign simplifies deployment, improves performance, and
provides better developer experience while maintaining all the
powerful features of the current system.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
https://claude.com/claude-code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
